landing.hero_subtitle: GoalGPT combines AI, statistics, and real match data to help you understand football outcomes — not guess them.
landing.hero_tagline: Smarter predictions powered by AI + real data
landing.value_subheading: GoalGPT turns raw football data into clear, probability-based predictions with full explanations.
landing.value_card_1_desc: Years of match results, scores, and statistics analyzed
landing.value_card_2_desc: Form, momentum, home/away records tracked in real-time
landing.value_card_3_desc: Advanced models that find patterns humans miss
landing.value_card_4_desc: Injuries, lineups, weather, and context factored in
landing.step_1_desc: Historical results, team stats, head-to-head records
landing.step_2_desc: Our model weighs dozens of factors simultaneously
landing.step_3_desc: Poisson distributions, xG models, form analysis
landing.step_5_title: You get a clear prediction + explanation
landing.step_5_desc: Transparent probabilities with full reasoning shown
landing.feature_1_desc: Not guesswork — data-driven predictions powered by machine learning and statistical models.
landing.feature_2_desc: See exactly why a prediction is made. Every factor, every weight, fully visible.
landing.feature_3_desc: AI explains match context — injuries, form, momentum, historical patterns, and more.
landing.feature_4_desc: Compare AI predictions vs crowd sentiment. Weighted by user accuracy. Coming soon.
landing.example_quote: "Bayern looks stronger statistically… but Real Madrid at home in Champions League matches often outperform expectations. Historical H2H shows Real winning 60% of knockout-stage meetings."
landing.example_caption: GoalGPT shows both sides of every match.
landing.disclaimer_1: GoalGPT provides independent AI-generated predictions based on data, statistics, and historical trends.
landing.disclaimer_2: Predictions are NOT guaranteed — no prediction system can be 100% accurate.
landing.disclaimer_3: This is NOT financial or betting advice.
landing.disclaimer_4: Users are fully responsible for their own decisions.
landing.disclaimer_5: GoalGPT is not liable for any losses incurred.
landing.cta_subheading: Join users who analyze football smarter — not harder.
landing.footer_disclaimer: GoalGPT provides AI-generated predictions for informational purposes only. Predictions are not guaranteed and do not constitute financial or betting advice. Users are responsible for their own decisions.
